name: IRC_TN_JOBS_B
description: Table for storing Jobs pulled from multiple customers.

columns.Name: TN_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: To store the subscriber id. Foreign Key to IRC_TN_SUBSCRIBERS.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the  Posting Status on TN (ORA_TN_POSTED/ORA_TN_UNPOSTED)

columns.Name: FA_RECRUITING_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of Recruiting as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_RECRUITING_TYPE.

columns.Name: FA_REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the REQUISITION_ID from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table

columns.Name: FA_REQUISITION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Stores the REQUISITION_NUMBER from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table

columns.Name: FA_REQ_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the REQ_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table

columns.Name: FA_JOB_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the job type code from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.JOB_TYPE_CODE. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_JOB_TYPE.

columns.Name: FA_JOB_SHIFT_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the job shift code from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.JOB_SHIFT_CODE. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_JOB_SHIFT

columns.Name: FA_EXT_CONTACT_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the External Contact name from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: FA_EXT_CONTACT_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Stores the External Contact email from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: JOB_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Stores the Sequence Number for the JOB from IRC_TN_JOB_NUMBER_S.

columns.Name: WORK_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores Expected Start Date from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: WORK_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores Expected End Date from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: MIN_SALARY
columns.Comments: Stores the minimum salary for this Requisition from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.MIN_SALARY table.

columns.Name: MAX_SALARY
columns.Comments: Stores the maximum salary for this Requisition from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.MAX_SALARY table

columns.Name: SALARY_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the salary currency code for this Requisition from  IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.SALARY_CURRENCY_CODE table.

columns.Name: STANDARD_WORKING_HOURS
columns.Comments: Stores the Number of standard working hours from HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F.STANDARD_WORKING_HOURS and IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.POSITION_ID table.

columns.Name: NAT_TRAVEL_REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores domestic travel required flag from  HRT_WORK_PREFERENCE_ITEMS_V.NAT_TRAVEL_REQUIRED_FLAG and IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID table.

columns.Name: INTL_TRAVEL_REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores International travel required flag from  HRT_WORK_PREFERENCE_ITEMS_V.INTL_TRAVEL_REQUIRED_FLAG and IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID table.

columns.Name: HOT_JOB_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether this Requisition should be considerate as a Hot Job or not from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.HOT_JOB_FLAG table.

columns.Name: NUMBER_TO_HIRE
columns.Comments: Stores the number of people to hire for this job.

columns.Name: UNLIMITED_HIRE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether this job can hire unlimited number of people.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the Object as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_OBJECT_STATUS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
